de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class AbstractTermTransformer

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractTermTransformer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Operator, SortedOperator, SVSubstitute, TermTransformer, Sorted
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AddCast, ArrayBaseInstanceOf, ConstantValue, CreateBeforeLoopUpdate, CreateFrameCond, CreateHeapAnonUpdate, CreateLocalAnonUpdate, CreateWellformedCond, DivideLCRMonomials, DivideMonomials, EnumConstantValue, ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct, IntroAtPreDefsOp, MemberPVToField, MetaAdd, MetaArithBitMaskOp, MetaDiv, MetaEqual, MetaGeq, MetaGreater, MetaLeq, MetaLess, MetaMul, MetaPow, MetaShift, MetaSub, ObserverEqualityMetaConstruct

    public abstract class AbstractTermTransformer
extends AbstractSortedOperator
implements TermTransformer
    Abstract class factoring out commonalities of typical term transformer implementations. The available singletons of term transformers are kept here.

      • validTopLevelException

        public void validTopLevelException(Term term)
                            throws TermCreationException
        Description copied from interface: Operator
        Checks whether the top level structure of the given @link Term is syntactically valid, given the assumption that the top level operator of the term is the same as this Operator. The assumption that the top level operator and the term are equal is NOT checked.
        Specified by:
        validTopLevelException in interface Operator
        Throws:
        TermCreationException - if a construction error was recognise

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Overrides:
